sourcesContent:
function Dashboard({ user, onLogout }) { const quizzes = [ { emoji: "🌍", title: "World Geography", questions: 15, difficulty: "Medium", color: "#dbeafe", badge: "#3b82f6", }, { emoji: "🔬", title: "Science & Nature", questions: 20, difficulty: "Hard", color: "#dcfce7", badge: "#22c55e", }, { emoji: "🎬", title: "Movies & Pop Culture", questions: 12, difficulty: "Easy", color: "#fef9c3", badge: "#eab308", }, { emoji: "📚", title: "History Facts", questions: 18, difficulty: "Hard", color: "#fce7f3", badge: "#ec4899", }, { emoji: "⚽", title: "Sports Trivia", questions: 10, difficulty: "Easy", color: "#ede9fe", badge: "#8b5cf6", }, { emoji: "💻", title: "Tech & Coding", questions: 25, difficulty: "Hard", color: "#ffedd5", badge: "#f97316", }, ]; return (
{/* Navbar */}
🧠 QuizMaster
{user.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}
{user.name}
{/* Welcome banner */}

Welcome back, {user.name.split(" ")[0]}! 👋

Ready to challenge yourself? Pick a quiz below.

{[ ["🏆", "0", "Points"], ["✅", "0", "Completed"], ["🔥", "1", "Day Streak"], ].map(([icon, val, label]) => (
{icon}
{val}
{label}
))}
{/* Quiz grid */}
Choose a Quiz
{quizzes.map((q) => (
alert( `🎮 "${q.title}" quiz would start here!\n\nThis is a demo — connect a backend to enable real quizzes.`, ) } >
{q.emoji} {q.difficulty}
{q.title}

{q.questions} questions

))}
); }
